# qbitOS ugrad — llms.txt

> https://github.com/qbitOS/ugrad

## Summary

Organization **umbrella** for μgrad / ugrad under qbitOS: compliance baseline, repo index, links to upstream [qbitOS/uvspeed](https://github.com/qbitOS/uvspeed). Documentation only in this repo.

## Key files

- COMPLIANCE.qmd — org baseline (Freya pattern)
- COMPLIANCE.md — IP, distribution, contact routing
- README.md — sibling repos and upstream docs
- NOTICES.md — upstream and license pointers

## Upstream code

https://github.com/qbitOS/uvspeed
